subject: [PATCH v3 07/10] fuse: add io-uring buffer pools (implemented as buffer ring)

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds support for buffer pools in the fuse io-uring implementation, allowing the server to pass a contiguous allocation of buffers that can be used on demand by the kernel. This decouples the number of entries from the number of payload buffers required, reducing memory usage and enabling future optimizations such as incremental buffer consumption. The server must set the FUSE_URING_BUFPOOL flag during registration and provide the payload buffer pool through an iovec payload in the first sqe. The kernel manages buffer selection and recycling using a buffer ring data structure.
